### How this maps to RAG design decisions

Observation What to fix

Low precision Better embeddings, reranking, filtering

Low recall Increase k, better chunking, query expansion

Both low Rebuild retrieval pipeline

Both high Move to generation evaluation

## 2. Mean Average Precision (MAP) and nDCG

What they measure: [...] What the score reflects: A high IoU indicates that the retrieved text has a high overlap with the ground-truth answer, meaning that the retriever is capturing the necessary information. However, note that it is a strict metric and may penalize retrievals that include additional relevant context that is not in the ground truth. [...] ЁЯУМEvaluation Pipeline

Step 1: Retrieve context for each question

Standard RAG retrieval.

Step 2: Generate answers

Using your RAG system.

ЁЯУМMetrics used (THIS IS KEY)

Context-level (before generation)

   Context Relevance
   Context Precision
   Context Recall

Answer-level (after generation)

   Answer Relevance
   Faithfulness

тЭМ Do NOT use:

   BLEU / ROUGE
   Exact match
   Answer correctness as a hard metric

ЁЯУМHow is correctness handled here?

Using LLM-as-judge (probabilistic)

   тАЬIs this answer likely correct?тАЭ
   тАЬDoes this answer make sense given the context?тАЭ

This is soft correctness, not absolute.

ЁЯУМWhat industry uses this scenario for

   Production monitoring
   CI/CD regression checks
   Hallucination detection
   Prompt & retriever tuning

title: Evaluation Metrics for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG ...
snippet:
| Metric Type | Examples | Strengths | Weaknesses |
 ---  --- |
| Retrieval Metrics | Hit Rate, MRR, Precision, Recall, nDCG | Simple, interpretable, directly measures relevance and ranking quality | DonтАЩt evaluate answer quality, fluency or coherence |
| Generation Metrics | BLEU, ROUGE, METEOR, BERTScore, Perplexity | Quantitative, widely used, easy to compute | May miss semantic meaning, context or factual correctness |
| End-to-End Metrics | Answer Relevance, Groundedness, Hallucination Rate, Coherence | Holistic evaluation of system, includes factual grounding | Harder to compute automatically, may require human evaluation | [...] They are domestic animals known for agility."] metrics = response_coherence_readability(responses) print(metrics)
